outline.caption: Streamline student certification in under three minutes with our automated tool. Scan for eligibility, track certifications, resolve holds, certify students, and maintain compliance. Try it now! Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Last Certification' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw more attention.
